allowed_actions: Validation command execution for local artifacts
Existing tests that do not mutate oshi-note implementation code
forbidden_actions: Call YouTube, Twitch, Stripe, GA4, or Ads APIs
Expose normal memo body, user identifiers, email addresses, raw logs, or free-form URLs to VTuber-facing artifacts
Treat unresolved legal, privacy, PR disclosure, material permission, or API Data questions as AI-approved

escalation_rules.trigger: A downstream task wants to implement referral pages, DB schema, dashboard, comments, cards, or analytics
escalation_rules.required_action: Resolve human_decision_packet.json or split unresolved items into typed human decisions

escalation_rules.trigger: Any design exposes normal memos, low-count aggregates, raw logs, direct identifiers, or free-form URLs to VTuber-facing surfaces
escalation_rules.required_action: Block implementation and run privacy review

escalation_rules.trigger: Any card or SNS template removes PR / provided-by disclosure for compensated promotion
escalation_rules.required_action: Block release and route to legal / compliance owner

escalation_rules.trigger: YouTube or Twitch API Data is proposed for title, thumbnail, ranking, or card display
escalation_rules.required_action: Resolve API Data usage decision and retention proof before implementation

forbidden: High-risk privacy / compliance / IP surfaces are in scope
Planning-only PoC explicitly forbids GitHub PR creation
